behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the target file path, the placeholder string 'LC_AUTOGENERATED', and describes the warning content requirements tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to do (add placeholder filename) without specifying exact line changes or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check output structure and the literal 'LC_AUTOGENERATED' string which is mandated by the instruction, not internal implementation details.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import and call convert_to_openai_data_block and run pytest/ruff subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert specific placeholder value, structure including file_data prefix, and warning contents — a stub wouldn't satisfy all.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three behaviors (placeholder added, warning updated, existing filenames preserved) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings labeling FAIL-TO-PASS vs PASS-TO-PASS.

structured_data_schema.reason: Output schema (type, file.file_data, file.filename) is described in instruction and asserted in tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file but not the exact line; localization within the file remains the agent's task.
